title: coussarea fanshawei
intro: Coussarea fanshawei, a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a tropical flowering plant native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coussarea fanshawei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
